mapper.sql: id, snapshot_date, snapshot_time, snapshot_name, source_type, snapshot_status, total_cost_amount, total_market_value, total_unrealized_pnl, total_pnl_rate, position_count, remark, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: UPDATE portfolio_position_snapshot SET snapshot_date = #{snapshotDate}, snapshot_time = #{snapshotTime}, snapshot_name = #{snapshotName}, total_cost_amount = #{totalCostAmount}, total_market_value = #{totalMarketValue}, total_unrealized_pnl = #{totalUnrealizedPnl}, total_pnl_rate = #{totalPnlRate}, position_count = #{positionCount}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND snapshot_status = 'DRAFT'
mapper.select: SELECT FROM portfolio_position_snapshot WHERE snapshot_status = 'CONFIRMED' ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT FROM portfolio_position_snapshot WHERE snapshot_status = 'CONFIRMED' AND snapshot_date <= #{upToDate} ORDER BY snapshot_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
